## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

## Validation

- [ ] PHP lint passed for changed plugin files
- [ ] Frontend build or smoke path checked where relevant
- [ ] Route / preview / rendering behavior still looks safe where relevant
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or workflow changed

## Scope check

- [ ] This change improves reliability, clarity, or validated behavior
- [ ] This does not widen the beta promise unintentionally
- [ ] Redirect, preview, and editorial safety were considered if touched

## Notes

- Risks, follow-ups, or intentionally deferred items:
